
```tsx
function App(props: { data?: Array<Record<string, any>>; config?: { columns?: Array<{ key: string; label: string }>; sortable?: boolean; paginated?: boolean; pageSize?: number }; onAction?: (action: string, rowIndex: number, data: any) => void }) {
  const [sortedData, setSortedData] = React.useState<Array<Record<string, any>>>([]);
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = React.useState(0);
  const [sortColumn, setSortColumn] = React.useState<string | null>(null);
  const [sortAsc, setSortAsc] = React.useState(true);

  const data = props.data || [
    { id: 1, name: "Alice Johnson", email: "alice@example.com", status: "Active" },
    { id: 2, name: "Bob Smith", email: "bob@example.com", status: "Inactive" },
    { id: 3, name: "Carol White", email: "carol@example.com", status: "Active" },
    { id: 4, name: "David Brown", email: "david@example.com", status: "Pending" },
    { id: 5, name: "Eve Davis", email: "eve@example.com", status: "Active" },
  ];

  const config = props.config || {
    columns: data.length > 0
      ? Object.keys(data[0]).map(key => ({ key, label: key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1) }))
      : [],
    sortable: true,
    paginated: true,
    pageSize: 3,
  };

  const columns = config.columns || [];
  const isSortable = config.sortable !== false;
  const isPaginated = config.paginated !== false;
  const pageSize = config.pageSize || 10;

  React.useEffect(() => {
    let newData = [...data];
    if (sortColumn && isSortable) {
      newData.sort((a, b) => {
        const aVal = a[sortColumn];
        const bVal = b[sortColumn];
        if (aVal < bVal) return sortAsc ? -1 : 1;
        if (aVal > bVal) return sortAsc ? 1 : -1;
        return 0;
      });
    }
    setSortedData(newData);
    setCurrentPage(0);
  }, [data, sortColumn, sortAsc]);

  const handleSort = (column: string) => {
    if (!isSortable) return;
    if (sortColumn === column) {
      setSortAsc(!sortAsc);
    } else {
      setSortColumn(column);
      setSortAsc(true);
    }
  };

  const paginatedData = isPaginated
    ? sortedData.slice(currentPage * pageSize, (currentPage + 1) * pageSize)
    : sortedData;

  const totalPages = Math.ceil(sortedData.length / pageSize);

  const handleAction = (action: string, rowIndex: number) => {
    const actualIndex = isPaginated ? currentPage * pageSize + rowIndex : rowIndex;
    if (props.onAction) {
      props.onAction(action, actualIndex, sortedData[actualIndex]);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div style={styles.container}>
      <style>{`
        :root {
          --color-surface: #ffffff;
          --color-text: #1a1a1a;
          --color-accent: #0066cc;
        }
      `}</style>
      <div style={styles.tableWrapper}>
        <table style={styles.table}>
          <thead>
            <tr style={styles.headerRow}>
              {columns.map(col => (
                <th
                  key={col.key}
                  style={{
                    ...styles.headerCell,
                    cursor: isSortable ? 'pointer' : 'default',
                  }}
                  onClick={() => handleSort(col.key)}
                >
                  <div style={styles.headerContent}>
                    <span>{col.label}</span>
                    {isSortable && sortColumn === col.key && (
                      <span style={styles.sortIcon}>{sortAsc ? '▲' : '▼'}</span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </th>
              ))}
              <th style={styles.headerCell}>Actions</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {paginatedData.map((row, idx) => (
              <tr key={idx} style={{...styles.bodyRow, backgroundColor: idx % 2 === 0 ? 'transparent' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.02)'}}>
                {columns.map(col => (
                  <td key={col.key} style={styles.bodyCell}>
                    {String(row[col.key])}
                  </td>
                ))}
                <td style={styles.bodyCell}>
                  <button
                    style={styles.actionButton}
                    onClick={() => handleAction('view', idx)}
                  >
                    View
                  </button>
                  <button
                    style={{...styles.actionButton, marginLeft: '4px'}}
                    onClick={() => handleAction('edit', idx)}
                  >
                    Edit
                  </button>
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      {isPaginated && totalPages > 1 && (
        <div style={styles.pagination}>
          <button
            style={styles.paginationButton}
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === 0}
          >
            Previous
          </button>
          <span style={styles.pageInfo}>
            Page {currentPage + 1} of {totalPages}
          </span>
          <button
            style={styles.paginationButton}
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
          >
            Next
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

const styles: Record<string, React.CSSProperties> = {
  container: {
    display: 'flex',
    flexDirection: 'column',
    gap: '16px',
    padding: '16px',
    backgroundColor: 'var(--color-surface)',
    color: 'var(--color-text)',
    fontFamily: '-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif',
  },
  tableWrapper: {
    overflowX: 'auto',
    borderRadius: '8px',
    border: '1px solid #e0e0e0',
  },
  table: {
    width: '100%',
    borderCollapse: 'collapse',
    fontSize: '14px',
  },
  headerRow: {
    backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
    borderBottom: '2px solid #e0e0e0',
  },
  headerCell: {
    padding: '12px 16px',
    textAlign: 'left',
    fontWeight: 600,
    color: 'var(--color-text)',
    userSelect: 'none',
  },
  headerContent: {
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    gap: '8px',
  },
  sortIcon: {
    fontSize: '10px',
    color: 'var(--color-accent)',
  },
  bodyRow: {
    borderBottom: '1px solid #e0e0e0',
    transition: 'background-color 0.2s',
  },
  bodyCell: {
    padding: '12px 16px',
    color: 'var(--color-text)',
  },
  actionButton: {
    padding: '4px 12px',
    backgroundColor: 'var(--color-accent)',
    color: 'white',
    border: 'none',
    borderRadius: '4px',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    fontSize: '12px',
    fontWeight: 500,
    transition: 'opacity 0.2s',
  },
  pagination: {
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    gap: '16px',
  },
  paginationButton: {
    padding: '8px 16px',
    backgroundColor: 'var(--color-accent)',
    color: 'white',
    border: 'none',
    borderRadius: '4px',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    fontSize: '14px',
    fontWeight: 500,
  },
  pageInfo: {
    fontSize: '14px',
    color: 'var(--color-text)',
  },
};
```
